ModMetaData.name: Royalty Tweaks
ModMetaData.author: Mobius
ModMetaData.description:
-=[ Royalty Tweaks 1.37 ]=-
* Bug fixes - Fresh installs now start with the throne room and passion skill features ON, as intended (previously every feature was silently off until you visited the mod options once). - Passion-skill re-enabling now only restores work disabled by TITLES - work disabled by a backstory, trait, or gene stays disabled, as it should. - Fixed royals passionate in ALL of their disabled work types getting nothing re-enabled at all. - Throne room tie-breaking (two royals sharing the top title) no longer depends on colonist order. - Passion checks now consider every skill relevant to a work type, not just the first one.
